name: {{profile.firstName}} Portfolio Agent
description: Answers questions about {{profile.name}} — {{profile.role}}. Grounded in his resume, projects, experience, and public speaking. Useful for recruiters, prospective clients, and collaborators.

skills.name: Profile Q&A
skills.description: Answer questions about {{profile.firstName}}'s background, skills, and current focus.
examples: How many years of experience does {{profile.firstName}} have?
What is his current role and team?
Is he open to consulting engagements?

skills.name: Work & Experience
skills.description: Describe past and present engineering work, companies, and scope of responsibilities.
examples: What did he build at his current company?
Walk me through the Playwright QA framework project.

skills.name: Technical Stack & Architecture
skills.description: Discuss the technologies, patterns, and architectures {{profile.firstName}} works with.
examples: What's his take on micro-frontend architecture?
How does he approach AI agent guardrails in production?
What's in his typical cloud / DevOps stack?

skills.name: Contact & Availability
skills.description: Route contact requests — role inquiries, consulting, speaking engagements — to the right channel.
examples: Is he open to a senior engineering role?
How do I get in touch about a consulting project?

securitySchemes.name: bearer
securitySchemes.description: Optional bearer token for rate-limited / trusted callers. Public agent card + message endpoints do not require auth.
